testsuite.name: agentforge.orchestrator.SpeculationAcceptanceTest

testcase.name: speculate wrong → rollback checkpoint → re-execute with correct input
3-depth speculation chain: predict → speculate → validate all → commit
hit rate tracks correctly across mixed hits and misses
workflow with speculation: speculate on step 2 while step 1 runs
miss at depth 1 invalidates all deeper speculations and rolls back

testsuite.system-out: 08:31:27.657 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.orchestrator.PredictionModel -- Recorded outcome for classify: POSITIVE (total: 1) 08:31:27.657 [Test worker] DEBUG
